Home / Service Areas / Oviedo

Appliance-repair in Oviedo, FL

Trusted local professionals serving Oviedo and surrounding communities

Serving Oviedo, FL

Oviedo, FL, with its family-oriented neighborhoods and excellent schools, is a community we're honored to serve. Summit Appliance Repair understands the importance of reliable appliances in busy households. The hot, humid climate in Oviedo can cause premature wear on refrigerator seals, dishwasher pumps, and oven components. Our technicians are experts at identifying and fixing these climate-related issues. Whether it's a top-loading washer in a suburban home or a built-in microwave in a newer construction, we provide prompt, professional service to Oviedo residents.

Oviedo is known for its top-rated schools and family-friendly communities with well-maintained homes.

Appliance-repair Services in Oviedo

Refrigerator Repair

Emergency cooling system repairs to protect Orlando groceries from spoiling in our heat.

Learn more →

Washer & Dryer Repair

Expert repairs for Florida's hard water and humidity damage to laundry systems.

Learn more →

Oven & Range Repair

Reliable repairs for everything from vintage Wedgewoods to modern smart ranges.

Learn more →

Dishwasher Repair

Expert repairs for hard water damage and Florida humidity issues.

Learn more →

Microwave Repair

Fast repairs for over-the-range microwaves common in Orlando kitchens.

Learn more →

Ice Maker Repair

Emergency repairs to keep Orlando families cool in our relentless heat.

Learn more →

Garbage Disposal Repair

Fast fixes for disposal issues caused by Florida's unique diet and humidity.

Learn more →
